name: @mypal/backend
description: MyPal is a self-hosted, open-source personal ai autonomous agent platform built with Go and Solid.js, designed to run on your own hardware for maximum privacy and control.

scripts.build:cross: mkdir -p ../../dist/daemon && pnpm run build:darwin-arm64 && pnpm run build:linux-arm64 && pnpm run build:linux-amd64
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" -o ../../dist/daemon/mypal-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/mypal
scripts.build:linux-arm64: GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" -o ../../dist/daemon/mypal-linux-arm64 ./cmd/mypal
scripts.build:linux-amd64: GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" -o ../../dist/daemon/mypal-linux-amd64 ./cmd/mypal
